title: Raccoon Removal in Manhattanville, Manhattan | $900 – $4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Manhattanville, Manhattan. Safe, humane wildlife control for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Raccoons are increasingly common in Manhattanville, taking advantage of the neighborhood's mix of residential buildings, green spaces, and proximity to Morningside Park. These intelligent animals can cause significant damage to roofs, attics, and chimneys while posing health risks to residents. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert raccoon removal services throughout Manhattanville, ensuring safe and humane solutions for your property.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has over 15 years of experience handling raccoon infestations in Manhattanville's diverse building types, from pre-war walk-ups to modern apartments near Columbia University. Our licensed technicians use humane trapping methods, comprehensive exclusion techniques, and provide full cleanup and sanitization services to protect your property and family.
localContext: Manhattanville's proximity to Morningside Park and Riverside Park, combined with ongoing development projects and older residential buildings along Broadway and 125th Street, creates ideal conditions for raccoon activity. The neighborhood's historic brownstones and apartment buildings with accessible rooflines make attic and chimney intrusions particularly common in this vibrant Manhattan community.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Manhattanville?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Manhattanville typically costs between $900 and $4,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, number of animals, accessibility of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work, cleanup, and preventative measures to ensure raccoons don't return.

faqs.question: Why are raccoons common in Manhattanville?
faqs.answer: Manhattanville's location between Morningside Park and Riverside Park provides raccoons with natural corridors and foraging areas. The neighborhood's mix of older buildings with accessible roof spaces, chimneys, and attics, plus abundant food sources from residential trash and restaurant activity along Broadway, make it attractive habitat for urban raccoons.

faqs.question: Are raccoons dangerous to Manhattanville residents?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons can pose several risks including rabies transmission, roundworm parasites in their droppings, aggressive behavior when cornered or protecting young, and structural damage to buildings. They can also contaminate insulation and create fire hazards by damaging electrical wiring in attics and walls.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove raccoons from my Manhattanville property?
faqs.answer: We can typically begin raccoon removal within 24-48 hours of your call. The complete removal process usually takes 3-10 days depending on the number of raccoons, whether babies are present, and the complexity of the infestation. We provide emergency same-day service for urgent situations in Manhattanville.
